name: veylin
description: Veylin — open-source, self-hosted general-purpose AI agent desktop platform. Claude Code–class agent loops (tools, plan mode, subagents, skills, hooks) plus DIY workspace panels (table, knowledge, workflow, web). Embedded SurrealDB; no Docker/Postgres/Redis.
author: Veylin contributors

scripts.test: npm run -w @veylin/shared test && npm run -w @veylin/db test && npm run -w @veylin/tools test && npm run -w @veylin/policy test && npm run -w @veylin/agent-package test && npm run -w @veylin/hooks test && npm run -w @veylin/runtime test && npm run -w @veylin/server test && npm run -w @veylin/web test
